name: Shouyue

skills.name: Accuracy
skills.description: Basic Attacks deal extra damage, and Critical Rate is converted into Physical Attack. Extra Critical Rate increases Basic Attack damage. When out of combat and next to a wall, gains disguise and Movement Speed.

skills.name: The Tranquil Eye
skills.description: Plants a device that continuously grants vision Passive: Gains increased Physical Pierce when standing still, but loses it when moving.

skills.name: Wild Wind
skills.description: Fires in the target direction, damaging and slowing the target hit.

skills.name: Getaway
skills.description: Leaps backwards and fires in the target direction, damaging and slowing the target hit while gaining Movement Speed. Rounds stocked are shared with Skill 2. Passive: Increases Basic Attack range.

tips: Shouyue (Assassin): Tier A on international ranked — 51.5% WR.
Build core: Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.5%, pick 0.79%, ban 0.09%, popularity tier A.
Counters Diaochan, Nakoruru, Ying · Weak into Liu Bang.

faqs.question: Is Shouyue good in current season?
faqs.answer: Shouyue is Tier A Assassin with 51.5% win rate, 0.79% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Shouyue build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Doomsday, Shadow Ripper, Overlord's Might, Eternity Blade. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Shouyue?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Shouyue: Liu Bang. Shouyue is strong into Diaochan, Nakoruru, Ying.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Diaochan, Nakoruru, Ying. Countered by: Liu Bang.
